description: To ensure inventory accuracy, a warehouse manager needs to perform a cycle count for a specific section of the warehouse.

nodes.task_description: Generate a cycle count sheet for a specific warehouse aisle.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a list of all items and their expected quantities for that aisle.

nodes.task_description: A warehouse worker physically counts the items and records the actual quantities.

expected_outcome.value: The worker enters the physical counts into a handheld device.

nodes.task_description: Compare the physical count to the system count and identify any discrepancies.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a discrepancy for one item: the system shows 100 units, but the physical count is 98.

nodes.task_description: Adjust the inventory record to match the physical count and flag the item for investigation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the inventory to 98 and creates a task to investigate the missing 2 units.
